nasb.text: Then behold, the word of the Lord came to him, saying, “This man will not be your heir; but one who will come forth from your own body, he shall be your heir.”

esv.text: And behold, the word of the Lord came to him: “This man shall not be your heir; your very own son shall be your heir.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的話又臨到亞伯蘭說：“這人必不會作你的繼承人；你親生的才會是你的繼承人。”

ccb.text: 耶和华又对他说：“这人不会成为你的继承人，你亲生的儿子才是你的继承人。”

csbs.text: 耶和华的话语又临到他，说：“这人不会是你的继承人，只有你亲生的，才会是你的继承人。”
